# Modes

Observed Figma mode names: Default, Light, Dark, Mobile, Tablet, Desktop.
Use the default values from `:root`. Apply an alternate stylesheet mode with the corresponding `data-figma-mode` slug.
| Mode | Minimum width |
| --- | --- |
| Desktop | 1024px |
| Mobile | 360px |
| Tablet | 768px |
